name: Cherry Crumb Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together butter and sugar.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, and mix well.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (sour cream/yogurt, milk, flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, vanilla extract, almond extract) and beat until well combined.
4. Spread half of the batter in a greased 13x9 inch baking pan.
5. Spread cherry pie filling over the batter.
6. Cover with the remaining batter.
7. For topping: In a small mixing bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, and mix until crumbly.
8. Add butter and nuts to the mixture and stir until well combined.
9. Sprinkle the topping evenly over the batter.
10. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean when lightly pressed with your finger.
